caption: The video displays a stationary image of a sign for "PETRIFIED FOREST NATIONAL PARK" set against a natural landscape with rocks and vegetation. Across the top of the scene, a red banner contains the white text "Common sense interventions". No people are visible in the scene. As the clip progresses, a cartoon-style speech bubble appears to the right of the park sign. The text within the bubble reads, "Your backyard is being vandalized every day by half tons of petrified wood of 1's tone a year, mostly a small piece at a time". In the final frame, additional white text appears at the bottom of the screen stating, "Behavior is strongly influenced by Descriptive Norms". The background imagery remains constant while the on-screen text elements are added sequentially.
